query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `pipeline_runs` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('running','success','failed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'running',
  `fetchedCount` int DEFAULT 0,
  `afterUrlDedup` int DEFAULT 0,
  `afterSimilarDedup` int DEFAULT 0,
  `digestCount` int DEFAULT 0,
  `reviewCount` int DEFAULT 0,
  `errorMessage` text,
  `startedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `finishedAt` timestamp NULL,
  CONSTRAINT `pipeline_runs_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `profile_weights` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `dimensionType` enum('source','category','keyword') NOT NULL,
  `dimensionValue` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
  `positiveCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `negativeCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `weight` float NOT NULL DEFAULT 1.0,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `profile_weights_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `profile_weights_dim_unique` UNIQUE(`dimensionType`, `dimensionValue`)
)

  `errorMessage` text,
  `startedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `finishedAt` timestamp NULL,
  CONSTRAINT `pipeline_runs_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `profile_weights` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `dimensionType` enum('source','category','keyword') NOT NULL,
  `dimensionValue` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
  `positiveCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `negativeCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `weight` float NOT NULL DEFAULT 1.0,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `profile_weights_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `profile_weights_dim_unique` UNIQUE(`dimensionType`, `dimensionValue`)
)
